AssociateFaces.description: Grants permission to associate multiple individual faces with a single user

CompareFaces.description: Grants permission to compare faces in the source input image with each face detected in the target input image

CopyProjectVersion.description: Grants permission to copy an existing model version to a new model version

CreateCollection.description: Grants permission to create a collection in an AWS Region

CreateDataset.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels dataset

CreateFaceLivenessSession.description: Grants permission to create a face liveness session

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels project

CreateProjectVersion.description: Grants permission to begin training a new version of a model

CreateStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Rekognition stream processor

CreateUser.description: Grants permission to create a new user in a collection using a unique user ID you provide

DeleteCollection.description: Grants permission to delete the specified collection

DeleteDataset.description: Grants permission to delete an existing Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels dataset

DeleteFaces.description: Grants permission to delete faces from a collection

DeleteProject.description: Grants permission to delete a project

DeleteProjectPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy attached to a project

DeleteProjectVersion.description: Grants permission to delete a model

DeleteStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to delete the specified stream processor

DeleteUser.description: Grants permission to delete a user from a collection based on the provided user ID

DescribeCollection.description: Grants permission to read details about a collection

DescribeDataset.description: Grants permission to describe an Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels dataset

DescribeProjectVersions.description: Grants permission to list the versions of a model in an Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels project

DescribeProjects.description: Grants permission to list Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels projects

DescribeStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified stream processor

DetectCustomLabels.description: Grants permission to detect custom labels in a supplied image

DetectFaces.description: Grants permission to detect human faces within an image provided as input

DetectLabels.description: Grants permission to detect instances of real-world labels within an image provided as input

DetectModerationLabels.description: Grants permission to detect moderation labels within the input image

DetectProtectiveEquipment.description: Grants permission to detect Personal Protective Equipment in the input image

DetectText.description: Grants permission to detect text in the input image and convert it into machine-readable text

DisassociateFaces.description: Grants permission to remove the association between a user ID and a face ID

DistributeDatasetEntries.description: Grants permission to distribute the entries in a training dataset across the training dataset and the test dataset for a project

GetCelebrityInfo.description: Grants permission to read the name, and additional information, of a celebrity

GetCelebrityRecognition.description: Grants permission to read the celebrity recognition results found in a stored video by an asynchronous celebrity recognition job

GetContentModeration.description: Grants permission to read the content moderation analysis results found in a stored video by an asynchronous content moderation job

GetFaceDetection.description: Grants permission to read the faces detection results found in a stored video by an asynchronous face detection job

GetFaceLivenessSessionResults.description: Grants permission to get results of a face liveness session

GetFaceSearch.description: Grants permission to read the matching collection faces found in a stored video by an asynchronous face search job

GetLabelDetection.description: Grants permission to read the label detected resuls found in a stored video by an asynchronous label detection job

GetMediaAnalysisJob.description: Grants permission to read the reference to job results in S3 and additional information about a media analysis job

GetPersonTracking.description: Grants permission to read the list of persons detected in a stored video by an asynchronous person tracking job

GetSegmentDetection.description: Grants permission to get the vdeo segments found in a stored video by an asynchronous segment detection job

GetTextDetection.description: Grants permission to get the text found in a stored video by an asynchronous text detection job

IndexFaces.description: Grants permission to update an existing collection with faces detected in the input image

ListCollections.description: Grants permission to read the collection Id's in your account

ListDatasetEntries.description: Grants permission to list the dataset entries in an existing Amazon Rekognition Custom Labels dataset

ListDatasetLabels.description: Grants permission to list the labels in a dataset

ListFaces.description: Grants permission to read metadata for faces in the specificed collection

ListMediaAnalysisJobs.description: Grants permission to read the list of media analysis jobs

ListProjectPolicies.description: Grants permission to list the resource policies attached to a project

ListStreamProcessors.description: Grants permission to get a list of your stream processors

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to return a list of tags associated with a resource

ListUsers.description: Grants permission to list UserIds and the UserStatus

PutProjectPolicy.description: Grants permission to attach a resource policy to a project

RecognizeCelebrities.description: Grants permission to detect celebrities in the input image

SearchFaces.description: Grants permission to search the specificed collection for the supplied face ID

SearchFacesByImage.description: Grants permission to search the specificed collection for the largest face in the input image

SearchUsers.description: Grants permission to search the specificed collection for user match result with given either face ID or user ID

SearchUsersByImage.description: Grants permission to search the specificed collection for user match result by using the largest face in the input image

StartCelebrityRecognition.description: Grants permission to start the asynchronous recognition of celebrities in a stored video

StartContentModeration.description: Grants permission to start asynchronous detection of explicit or suggestive adult content in a stored video

StartFaceDetection.description: Grants permission to start asynchronous detection of faces in a stored video

StartFaceLivenessSession.description: Grants permission to start streaming video for a face liveness session

StartFaceSearch.description: Grants permission to start an asynchronous search for faces in a collection that match the faces of persons detected in a stored video

StartLabelDetection.description: Grants permission to start asynchronous detection of labels in a stored video

StartMediaAnalysisJob.description: Grants permission to start a media analysis job

StartPersonTracking.description: Grants permission to start the asynchronous tracking of persons in a stored video

StartProjectVersion.description: Grants permission to start running a model version

StartSegmentDetection.description: Grants permission to start the asynchronous detection of segments in a stored video

StartStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to start running a stream processor

StartTextDetection.description: Grants permission to start the asynchronous detection of text in a stored video

StopProjectVersion.description: Grants permission to stop a running model version

StopStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to stop  a running stream processor

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add one or more tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove one or more tags from a resource

UpdateDatasetEntries.description: Grants permission to add or update one or more JSON Lines (entries) in a dataset

UpdateStreamProcessor.description: Grants permission to modify properties for a stream processor

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
